name: Basic Easy Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, stir the flour and salt together.
2. Cut in the shortenings using a pastry blender until the mixture is rather grainy, like coarse cornmeal.
3. In a small bowl, mix the egg and vinegar together.
4. Using a wooden fork, stir the egg mixture into the flour.
5. Gradually add ice water, a tablespoon at a time, until the dough barely holds together.
6. Place the dough on a marble pastry board or plastic countertop.
7. Knead the dough just a few times so it holds together and becomes rollable.
8. Roll out the dough on waxed paper; this makes handling easier.
9. If using a wooden rolling pin, dust it with flour a couple of times during rolling.
10. Optionally, for a sweet pie crust, stir in 1 tablespoon sugar along with the flour and salt before adding the water.
